name: Lucid Group, Inc.
business: Lucid Group, Inc. designs, engineers, manufactures, and sells electric vehicles (EVs), including the Lucid Air sedan and the Lucid Gravity SUV. It also develops EV powertrains, battery systems, and software for its vehicles and supplies technology to partners such as Aston Martin. The company sells vehicles directly to consumers through its retail Studios and online channels, and also has a purchase agreement with the Government of Saudi Arabia.
sellsTo: Direct-to-consumer in North America, Europe, and Middle East
Government of Saudi Arabia and its entities

exposures.sentence: Lucid designed, developed, manufactures and sells two groundbreaking EVs: The Lucid Air sedan, for which customer deliveries began in late 2021, and the Lucid Gravity SUV, which arrived on the road in late 2024.
We designed the Wunderbox to enable ultra-fast DC and bi-directional AC charging with proprietary technology.
In October 2025, we announced a new roadmap for ADAS and autonomous driving, turbocharged by NVIDIA Corporation ( NVIDIA ) DRIVE AV platform.
The Lucid Air is equipped with an extensive sensor suite, high on-board computing power, back-up systems for ADAS and, over time, increased levels of automation.

In 2025, Lucid formed a partnership with Uber Technologies, Inc. ( Uber ) and Nuro, Inc. ( Nuro ) to launch a next-generation autonomous robotaxi leveraging Lucid Gravity 's advanced technology platform.

catalysts.event: Start of production of Midsize platform vehicles
catalysts.sentence: The Midsize platform is currently in advanced stages of development and is scheduled to start production in late 2026.
We expect to substantially complete the Plan by the end of the second quarter of 2026, subject to local law and consultation requirements.

catalysts.event: First commercial deployment of robotaxi in San Francisco Bay Area
catalysts.sentence: We achieved several significant milestones, and we are preparing for an expected first commercial deployment in the San Francisco Bay Area.
